question.text: Option sellers benefit from which Greek?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Theta is positive for short positions — sellers benefit as options lose time value daily. Sellers have negative gamma and negative vega (hurt by volatility increases). **The Trap:** Sellers are hurt by high gamma (rapid delta changes) and high vega (volatility spikes). **Cross-Exam Context:** Greek preferences by position are tested in Series I and VIII. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Ideal selling environment: Low volatility (low vega risk), near expiry (high theta benefit), ATM options (maximum time value to collect).
